hq: Thousand Oaks, California, United States (Amgen contact address: https://www.amgen.com/contact-us)
aging_relevance_reasoning: Amgen’s marketed portfolio includes therapies for major age-associated chronic conditions, including chronic inflammatory diseases (ENBREL/etanercept indications and TNF-blocking mechanism: https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cder/daf/index.cfm?event=overview.process&ApplNo=103795), osteoporosis/bone loss (PROLIA/denosumab: https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cder/daf/index.cfm?event=overview.process&ApplNo=125320; EVENITY/romosozumab: https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cder/daf/index.cfm?event=overview.process&ApplNo=761062), and atherosclerotic cardiovascular risk via LDL-C lowering (REPATHA/evolocumab: https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cder/daf/index.cfm?event=overview.process&ApplNo=125522). Amgen is also developing an obesity program (AMG 133 in subjects with obesity on ClinicalTrials.gov: https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT04478708), which is relevant to aging-linked cardiometabolic risk. However, public materials reviewed do not establish an explicit, dedicated aging/longevity drug-development strategy.

existing_longevity_assets.indication: Multiple inflammatory indications including rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, plaque psoriasis, and juvenile idiopathic arthritis (US label, Indications and Usage)
existing_longevity_assets.relevance: Targets TNF-mediated inflammation (TNF blocker per US label), relevant to aging-associated chronic inflammation and inflammatory comorbidities.

existing_longevity_assets.indication: Treatment of osteoporosis in postmenopausal women and men at high risk for fracture, among other bone-loss indications (US label, Indications and Usage)
existing_longevity_assets.relevance: RANKL inhibitor per US label; addresses age-related bone loss/fragility (osteoporosis indications).

existing_longevity_assets.indication: Treatment of osteoporosis in postmenopausal women at high risk for fracture (US label, Indications and Usage)
existing_longevity_assets.relevance: Sclerostin inhibitor per US label; relevant to skeletal aging via increasing bone formation and decreasing bone resorption (mechanism described in label).

existing_longevity_assets.indication: LDL-C lowering in adults with established cardiovascular disease and certain hypercholesterolemia populations (US label, Indications and Usage)
existing_longevity_assets.relevance: PCSK9-directed antibody per US label; relevant to cardiometabolic aging by reducing LDL-C and cardiovascular risk in indicated populations.

existing_longevity_assets.indication: Adjunctive treatment of adult patients with severe active anti-neutrophil cytoplasmic autoantibody (ANCA)-associated vasculitis (US label, Indications and Usage)
existing_longevity_assets.relevance: C5a receptor (C5aR) antagonist per US label; relevant to inflammatory/immune-mediated pathology that can contribute to age-related multimorbidity.

recent_acquisitions.relevance: Expanded Amgen’s portfolio in inflammation/autoimmune and rare diseases (deal announcement and rationale described by Amgen).
Added an inflammation/immunology asset (TAVNEOS) and pipeline (deal announcement by Amgen).
Strengthened oncology R&D pipeline (deal announcement by Amgen).

acquisition_pattern.preferred_stage: Late-stage and commercial/derisked assets alongside selective clinical-stage bolt-ons (inferred from acquisitions of Horizon Therapeutics (commercial portfolio) and ChemoCentryx (TAVNEOS marketed) plus Five Prime (clinical-stage oncology); sources: https://www.amgen.com/newsroom/press-releases/2022/12/amgen-to-acquire-horizon-therapeutics-plc ; https://www.amgen.com/newsroom/press-releases/2022/08/amgen-to-acquire-chemocentryx ; https://www.amgen.com/newsroom/press-releases/2021/03/amgen-to-acquire-five-prime-therapeutics ; TAVNEOS label: https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cder/daf/index.cfm?event=overview.process&ApplNo=215239
acquisition_pattern.recent_trend: Large-scale platform/portfolio expansion in immunology/rare disease (Horizon, $27.8B) complemented by smaller immunology and oncology deals (ChemoCentryx, $3.7B; Five Prime, $1.9B); values per Amgen press releases cited above, with avg_deal_size_usd computed as the arithmetic mean of these three disclosed transaction values.
